title: Astral Cats
description: Replaces all moon and sun phases in the game with images of a sleeping cat
body: This texture pack replaces all moon and sun phases in the game with images of a sleeping cat, offering an adorable and relaxing aesthetic. Each moon phase shows the cat in different postures, while the sun also transforms into the sleeping cat itself. This change adds a touch of cuteness and tranquility to the game, providing a visually pleasing and personalized experience for players looking for a more peaceful and charming environment.
